message:
perf(types): lazy record decode, conditional profiling, and value helpers

Record decoding (record.rs):
- Thread profiling-enabled flag through decode_value / decode_value_into
  so the per-value note_decoded_value() accounting is skipped entirely
  when hot-path profiling is disabled — removes a branch from every
  column decode in the VDBE OP_Column fast path.
- Add parse_record_header_into() for header-only parsing that builds a
  ColumnOffset table without decoding any values; individual columns are
  then decoded on demand via decode_column_from_offset().
- Add parse_record_prefix() for partial record decode (first N columns).
- Add proptest prop_lazy_decode_matches_full to validate lazy decode
  matches eager decode for all valid records.

Serial types (serial_type.rs):
- Mark read_varint, classify_serial_type, serial_type_len with
  #[inline(always)] (with clippy allow) — these are the innermost
  hot-loop functions in record parsing.

Value (value.rs):
- Add SqliteValue::is_truthy() and format_for_comparison() helpers used
  by downstream VDBE and connection code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
